videos.title: Nintendo Treehouse: Live | Splatoon Raiders
videos.description:
Join us after the Splatoon Raiders Direct 6.30.2026 to watch Nintendo Treehouse: Live for additional Splatoon Raiders gameplay. The livestream will last approximately 30 minutes.

Splatoon Raiders releases exclusively for Nintendo Switch 2 on July 23, 2026. Pre-order today: https://www.nintendo.com/
